intro: PYT is built by a small staff and a generous community of volunteers. Whether you're looking for a paid role on our team or a way to help us put on a show, we'd love to hear from you.
volunteer_intro: Volunteers are essential to everything we do. Whether you have a few hours during a show weekend or want a regular role behind the scenes, there's a way to help.
title: Work with us

volunteer_opportunities.title: Front-of-house volunteer
volunteer_opportunities.time_commitment: About 4 hours per show, sign up for as many or as few as you like
volunteer_opportunities.description: Greet families, scan tickets, help with concessions, and answer questions during our Mainstage productions.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Costume shop helper
volunteer_opportunities.description: Help our costume designer prep, mend, organize, and pull costumes for upcoming productions.

roles.title: Production Manager
roles.description: Lead the logistics, scheduling, and technical needs of our three Mainstage productions per year.

roles.title: Teaching Artist
roles.description: Lead after-school drama classes and weekend workshops for students ages 6–14.
